inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 diluted EPS $5.35 (10-K) less ~5% haircut for equity-plan dilution and regulatory lag [Assumption]; OCF $3,353M and capex $4,128M imply negative raw free cash flow during rate-base growth cycle
inputs.normalization_note: Regulated utility: Lawrence uses filing earnings power per share, not OCF minus total capital spending. Heavy 2026-2030 capex ($30.5-33.1B) is recovered through PISA, MYRP, and transmission formula rates.

growth_explanation.years_1_5: Rate-base growth from $30.5-33.1B five-year capital plan (Missouri Smart Energy Plan ~$20.8B, Illinois distribution/transmission, ATXI) recovered via allowed ROEs (Illinois electric 8.72%, transmission 10.48%, Missouri trackers/PISA).
growth_explanation.years_6_10: Load growth from data-center/large-load tariffs (1.5 GW by 2032 per 10-K) and grid modernization sustain mid-single-digit earnings after initial capex wave.

bear.notes: Regulatory lag, Illinois MYRP appeals, equity dilution at top of $4B plan, affordability pushback on rates

base.notes: Rate-base CAGR from filed capex plan; dividend payout 50-60% of earnings

bull.notes: Faster large-load interconnections, constructive Missouri PPRA implementation, minimal dilution via ATM/DRPlus

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Regulated rate base on balance sheet; no land-at-cost pattern

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Integrated regulated wires and generation; no royalty trust

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Large-load/data-center interconnection pipeline (1.5 GW by 2032) flows through rate-base growth, not separate option

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Stable regulated dividend; no suspended payout

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Renewable additions and grid upgrades earn through Missouri PISA and Illinois MYRP

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Operating-only fallback. Add an explicit component_valuation schedule before drawing asset-level conclusions.

ownership_waterfall.net_economic_claim: One AEE common share equals pro-rata regulated owner-cash engine, incremental large-load option, less minority claims and dilution/regulatory reserve.
excluded_claims: Regulated debt is recovered through customer rates and is not double-subtracted at equity level.
Large-load revenue already in base rate-base growth is embedded in owner-cash engine, not the option row.
ownership_waterfall.reconciliation: FY2025 diluted EPS $5.35/sh on 276.4M shares; OCF $3353.0M; capex $4128.0M; ~$4000.0B equity plan 2026–2030.

valuation_method_route.label: Predictable cash-flow security
failure_modes: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

economic_ownership_map.label: Operating business (fallback)
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Risk and timing are reflected in the low/base/high range.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.

method_route.label: Predictable cash-flow security
failure_modes: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

blockers: operating_business_fallback: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required

falsifiers: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map regulated owner-cash engine, large-load interconnection option, minority financial claims, and equity dilution/regulatory reserve once each.

components.label: Regulated Missouri, Illinois, and transmission owner-cash engine

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AEE/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260218_rpt20251231_acc0001002910_26_000009.htm: FY2025 EPS $5.35/sh, OCF $3353.0M, capex $4128.0M, equity plan ~$4000.0B; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 net income attributable to common shareholders
FY2025 net cash from operating activities

source.locator: 276.4M common shares outstanding per 10-K cover page

assumptions.label: Normalized regulated owner earnings per share (starting cash flow)
assumptions.rationale: FY2025 diluted EPS $5.35 less ~5% haircut for equity-plan dilution and regulatory lag; Lawrence uses filing earnings power, not OCF minus growth capex.

assumptions.label: Growth years 1–5 on normalized owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Rate-base CAGR from $30.5–33.1B 2026–2030 capex plan recovered via PISA/MYRP.

assumptions.label: Growth years 6–7 on normalized owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Load growth and grid modernization sustain mid-single-digit earnings after initial capex wave.

assumptions.label: Required return on regulated owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Utility equity cost of capital; affordability and regulatory lag risk premium.

assumptions.label: Selling multiple in year 7
assumptions.rationale: Regulated utility peer multiples on normalized owner cash.

assumptions.label: Component schedule reconciliation factor
assumptions.rationale: Preserves additive component schedule while filing facts anchor owner-cash bridge.

valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

assumptions.rationale: Incremental earnings beyond base rate-base path from data-center/large-load tariffs; embedded partially in owner-cash growth; this row sizes the non-overlapping upside band.

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AEE/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260218_rpt20251231_acc0001002910_26_000009.htm: FY2025 EPS $5.35/sh, OCF $3353.0M, capex $4128.0M, equity plan ~$4000.0B; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

assumptions.label: Minority and non-common claims allocated away from common economic value
assumptions.rationale: Regulated utility debt is recovered through rates and is not subtracted again at equity level; only noncontrolling interest is a separate claim on consolidated value.

valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.

assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for planned ~$4B equity issuance, Illinois MYRP appeal timing risk, and affordability-driven ROE pressure not fully embedded in base owner-cash path.

calculations.label: Equity dilution and regulatory reserve per share
